author: Deividas Mataciunas
name: Runpod 1GPU Twicing Eval Split
blurb: Exploratory 1x H100, 1-shard, 10-minute checkpoint run. The best balanced profile used ATTN_TWICE_ALPHA=0.05 with EVAL_SEQ_LEN=2048 and TTT_EVAL_SEQ_LEN=1024, reaching final_int8_ttt_lora val_bpb 1.3960 under the 16MB artifact cap.
